    Tomasz K. Piskorz

    Computational Chemist | JSPS Fellow at Packwood Group at Kyoto University

    • Kyoto, Japan
    • Email

    CV

    Education

    • B.Sc. in Chemistry, University of Warsaw, 2011 Jul
    • M.Sc. in Chemistry, University of Warsaw, 2013 Oct
    • Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering, Delft University of Technology, 2019 Sep

    Work experience

    • JSPS post-doctoral Research Fellow at Packwood Group at Kyoto University (2025 Sep - present)

    • Post-doctoral Research Associate at Duarte Research Group at Oxford University (2019 Oct - 2025 Aug)

    • Research associate at St. Peter’s College at Oxford University (2023 Feb - present)

    • PhD Researcher in Advance Soft Matter group at Delft University of Technology (2014 Jul - 2019 Sep)

    • Visiting researcher in Laboratoire Polymères et Matériaux Avancés at Solvey (2016 Oct-Dec)

    • Visiting researcher in Tuttle Lab at University of Strathclyde (2016 Apr-Aug)

    • Research Assistant in biophysical chemistry group at Polish Academy of Science (2012 Sep – 2013 Jun)

    Expertise

    • Chemistry:
      • Supramolecular chemistry
      • Polymer chemistry
    • Computational chemistry:
      • Molecular dynamics
      • Multiscale modeling
      • Force-field development/validation
      • Rare-event sampling methods
      • Quantum mechanics
    • Data analysis
      • Statistics
      • Machine learning
